title: allium alpinum
intro: Allium alpinum, also known as Alpine garlic, is a type of flowering plant in the onion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Allium alpinum include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Allium alpinum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", Allium alpinum benefits may include preventing tumor promotion, cardiovascular diseases, and aging due to its strong antioxidative properties.
